title: Copy Screenshot
description: Copies taken screenshot to the specified folder
body:
Friends not believing that you've built 1:1 scaled earth model because you accidentally deleted your instance folder with all screenshots?

****Suffer no more!****

With this mod your screenshots will always be safe in one place where pesky modpack launchers can't touch them!

 
- Copies newly taken screenshots to specified folder - path to the folder can be changed in by editing config/copyscreenshot-client.toml.
- Original files stay in screenshots folder of the instance.
- Screenshots are placed in a world name folder (or server name if on server) by default. This can be turned off to place all in one folder.
 

**This is a client side only mod.**
